testcase.name: test_notary_profile_creation_triggers_submitted_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_email_notifications.py:175: in test_notary_profile_creation_triggers_submitted_email assert response.status_code == 200, f"Profile creation failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Profile creation failed: 422 - {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","license_number"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"Notary Applicant d77c0e91","commission_number":"NC-2025-10dcfb06","license_state":"California","license_expiration":"2027-12-31","ron_certified":true,"bio":"Test notary applicant"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","commission_expiry"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"Notary Applicant d77c0e91","commission_number":"NC-2025-10dcfb06","license_state":"California","license_expiration":"2027-12-31","ron_certified":true,"bio":"Test notary applicant"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_approve_notary_triggers_approval_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_email_notifications.py:221: in test_approve_notary_triggers_approval_email assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Profile creation failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Profile creation failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","license_number"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"Notary Applicant 68c59f7e","commission_number":"NC-2025-281ff2a8","license_state":"Texas","license_expiration":"2028-12-31","ron_certified":false,"bio":"Test notary for approval"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","commission_expiry"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"Notary Applicant 68c59f7e","commission_number":"NC-2025-281ff2a8","license_state":"Texas","license_expiration":"2028-12-31","ron_certified":false,"bio":"Test notary for approval"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reject_notary_triggers_rejection_email
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_email_notifications.py:258: in test_reject_notary_triggers_rejection_email assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Profile creation failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Profile creation failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","license_number"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"Notary Applicant b263b014","commission_number":"NC-2025-b5185ef2","license_state":"Florida","license_expiration":"2028-06-30","ron_certified":true,"bio":"Test notary for rejection"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","commission_expiry"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"full_name":"Notary Applicant b263b014","commission_number":"NC-2025-b5185ef2","license_state":"Florida","license_expiration":"2028-06-30","ron_certified":true,"bio":"Test notary for rejection"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_notarization_request
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_email_notifications.py:320: in test_create_notarization_request assert response.status_code == 200, f"Request creation failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Request creation failed: 422 - {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","document_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"document_type":"Power of Attorney","notes":"Test notarization request for email testing c5d3d750"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","notarization_type"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"document_type":"Power of Attorney","notes":"Test notarization request for email testing c5d3d750"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
